name: IMA Studio Video Generation
tagline: Text-to-video, image-to-video — Wan, Kling, Veo, Sora, Pixverse, Hailuo, SeeDance. One-stop AI video generation.
description: Premier AI video generation using IMA Open API with runtime model discovery. Supports text-to-video, image-to-video, first-last-frame, and reference-image modes. Use for video generation, character animation, product demos, social media clips, storytelling, and explainer videos. Requires IMA_API_KEY. Works standalone; when ima-knowledge-ai is installed, optional reference reads may be used for workflow and consistency guidance.
credentialNotice: The IMA API key is required at runtime (--api-key or IMA_API_KEY). It is always sent to api.imastudio.com for product/task APIs. It is sent to imapi.liveme.com only when image-based tasks need local/non-HTTPS image uploads. Obtain keys at https://imastudio.com. Use a scoped or test key if concerned about credential exposure.
optionalDependencyNote: When ima-knowledge-ai is installed, this skill may optionally read ~/.openclaw/skills/ima-knowledge-ai/references/* for video-mode selection and visual-consistency guidance. The skill works standalone without those reads.

requires.credentialNote: IMA_API_KEY is required at runtime. It is sent to api.imastudio.com and, for local/non-HTTPS image uploads, to imapi.liveme.com.

localPaths.purpose: Preferences (model defaults) and generation logs; logs auto-deleted after 7 days. User can delete anytime.

persistence.retention: Logs are auto-cleaned after 7 days; preferences remain until user deletes them.

use_cases: Character animation, product demos, short clips
key_features: Wan, Kling, Veo, Sora, Pixverse and more
Self-contained skill with transparent API usage
